case_title: LINDA COOPER VS. Y & L AUTO CORPORATION DBA GENERAL AUTO SERVICE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF LINDA COOPER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT Y & L AUTO CORPORATION DBA GENERAL AUTO, REPRESENTED BY HSING JUNG LEE, OWNER IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2022 - CONTINUED FOR MANDARIN INTERPRETER TO MAY-20-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LINDA COOPER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT Y & L AUTO CORPORATION, REPRESENTED BY KUEI CHANG YEH AND HSING JUNG LEE, OWNERS IS PRESENT. COURT DETERMINES THAT A MANDARIN INTERPERTER IS REQURIED FOR DEFENDANT KUEI CHANG YEH. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE TO PROVIDE A MANDARIN INTERPERTER FOR DEFENDANT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KUI CHANG YEH, OWNER FILED BY DEFENDANT Y & L AUTO CORPORATION DBA GENERAL AUTO SERVICE
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOPER, LINDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT Y & L AUTO CORPORATION DBA GENERAL AUTO SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30) SERVED MAR-10-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT Y & L AUTO CORPORATION DBA GENERAL AUTO SERVICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY COOPER, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT Y & L AUTO CORPORATION DBA GENERAL AUTO SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) HSING-JUNG LEE, OWNER FILED BY DEFENDANT Y & L AUTO CORPORATION DBA GENERAL AUTO SERVICE
